name: LogsCompute
description: A computation to perform over the filtered log set

aggregation.description: The type of aggregation to compute over log events

metric.description: The log attribute to aggregate (required for all aggregations except count)

type.description: Whether this is a total aggregation or a timeseries

interval.description: The time interval for timeseries computations (e.g., 1m, 1h, 1d)
